steps.action: Cmd-select Dan Lee + Eve Miller and run bulk Update Status -> Planned
steps.expected: Selected employees move to Planned status and Kanban reflects change
steps.observed: Dan Lee and Eve Miller changed to Planned in OrgChart and Kanban cards showed Planned

steps.action: Re-select the same two employees and run bulk Update Level -> IC4
steps.observed: Hierarchy rows for Dan Lee and Eve Miller both showed IC4

steps.action: Select 3 employees and click Delete Selected
steps.expected: Confirmation dialog shows exact count and Cancel/Confirm controls
steps.observed: Dialog title displayed 'Delete 3 Employees?' with Cancel and Delete 3 Employees actions
All selected employees remained visible after cancel

steps.action: Open dialog again and confirm delete
steps.observed: Headcount dropped from 10 to 7 and the 3 employees were removed

assertions.title: Bulk operations are undoable as single step

steps.action: Bulk update department for Alice Smith, Bob Johnson, and Carol Smith to Marketing
steps.observed: All 3 updated together in Hierarchy after one bulk action

steps.expected: Single undo reverts all 3 employee departments
steps.observed: One Cmd+Z restored Engineering/Product/Design for the same 3 employees

evidence.network: PATCH /api/employees/69e19e732bce4b5d491177ea, PATCH /api/employees/69e19e732bce4b5d491177eb, PATCH /api/employees/69e19e732bce4b5d491177ec (bulk update + undo replay)

assertions.title: Select all with Cmd+A

steps.action: Press Cmd+A in OrgChart and Hierarchy after focusing the canvas/view container
steps.expected: All employees selected and selected-count equals total
steps.observed: Cmd+A did not produce all-selection state; selected-count UI did not appear and interaction instead focused/opened a single employee detail panel

evidence.network: No relevant API calls; keyboard selection behavior only

assertions.issues: Cmd+A did not trigger select-all behavior in tested views; expected full multi-select state was not observed.

assertions.title: CSV import updates all views and budget immediately

steps.action: Capture baseline totals (headcount and budget), then import CSV with 10 BatchB employees
steps.expected: Headcount and budget increase immediately without refresh
steps.observed: Headcount increased from 7 to 17; Salary Cost increased from $810,000 to $1,810,000; Budget Grand Total increased from $879,000 to $1,929,000

steps.action: Verify imported records in OrgChart and Spreadsheet
steps.expected: OrgChart shows 10 new nodes and Spreadsheet shows 10 new rows
steps.observed: OrgChart displayed BatchB nodes; Spreadsheet filtered to 'BatchB' returned exactly 10 rows

assertions.title: Status filter applies consistently across all views

steps.action: Set status filters to Active + Planned only (Open Req and Backfill disabled)
steps.observed: Hierarchy rowCount=14 with statuses {Active, Planned}; OrgChart nodeCount=14

steps.action: Navigate across Spreadsheet and Kanban with same filter state
steps.expected: Counts and visible statuses remain consistent, with no Open Req/Backfill employees
steps.observed: Spreadsheet rowCount=14 with statuses {Active, Planned}; Kanban grouped by status showed Active=7, Planned=7, Open Req=0, Backfill=0

evidence.network: No filter-specific API calls observed; filtering behavior was client-side

assertions.title: Search query filters consistently across views

steps.observed: OrgChart search value='Smith' with nodeCount=2 (Alice Smith, Carol Smith)

steps.action: Navigate OrgChart -> Hierarchy -> Spreadsheet without clearing search
steps.expected: Search term persists and each view shows only matching employees
steps.observed: Hierarchy persisted search='Smith' with rowCount=2; Spreadsheet persisted search='Smith' with rowCount=2

evidence.network: No search-specific API calls observed; search filtering behavior was client-side

frictions.description: Import CSV uses an ephemeral file input + native picker, which is not directly driveable in headless automation.
frictions.resolution: Hooked the generated file input in-page and dispatched a synthetic CSV File change event to execute the same import path.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 6 passed (VAL-MULTI-007/008/009, VAL-CROSS-011/012/013) and 1 failed (VAL-MULTI-010 Cmd+A select-all did not activate full multi-selection).
